productDisplayName: Puma Men Motorsport Navy Blue Shirts
description: Composition Navy blue half sleeved shirt made of 100% cotton, full length buttoned placket, pocket on the left chest with embroidered band logo, and a curved hemline Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water at 40 degrees Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean puma takes the fashionable twist with shirts, perfectly suited for the men who are casual at heart. If you like to chill out with your group or take a stroll along the park with your girlfriend, then this perfectly comfortable cotton shirt is just perfect for you. Pair this with denims and sneakers to complete the killer look. Model Statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-19"
